operating_status.title: Operating Status
operating_status.description: ACTIVE / CLOSED / UNCERTAIN based on evidence from Yelp/Google/site in last 6 months.

contact_email.title: Contact Email
contact_email.description: Public email from own site contact page, Yelp bio, Google listing, or reservation platform. Leave blank if none found - do not guess.

chain_flag.title: Chain Flag
chain_flag.description: INDEPENDENT (1-2 locations owner-operated), MINI_CHAIN (3-5 local), CHAIN (6+ or national), or CELEBRITY (James Beard / food network chef).

positive_verbatim_quote.title: Positive Verbatim Quote
positive_verbatim_quote.description: Exact verbatim text from a real public review or own-site testimonial. 30-200 chars. No composite/paraphrase. No promotional cliches (best ever, 5 stars). No blocked tokens (food poisoning, hospital).

positive_reviewer_tag.title: Positive Reviewer Tag
positive_reviewer_tag.description: Reviewer first name + last initial + date for provenance only. Not used in outreach body.

negative_verbatim_quote.title: Negative Verbatim Quote
negative_verbatim_quote.description: Exact verbatim 1-2 star review text, 30-180 chars, describing a specific operational pain (slow service, food consistency, attentiveness, etc.). No illness claims. Prefer quotes without em-dashes.

key_complaint.title: Key Complaint
key_complaint.description: One of: slow service, food quality, service attentiveness drift, price-to-value, cleanliness, wait reservation, noise acoustics, billing service fee.

drift_fit.title: Drift Fit
drift_fit.description: GOOD (3.0-3.7 stars, 200-700 reviews, real complaint cluster), WEAK (4.0+ or <200 reviews), or NONE (too-high-profile, chain, closed).
